name: Freedom so Sweet (2/2)
description:
The sequel to my bot, This is War. After escaping, everyone is living their lives happily. They've all formed a community to stay close knit. After all, nothing brings people closer than trauma bonding!

Characters:

Noob, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Guest 1337, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure.

Slasher, John Doe, Mafioso (and gang), Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, MrDoombringer, Guest 666/Sixer.

Daisy, Charlotte, Jane Doe.

One big happy community/family! Aww...

Stay hydrated or else I'll throw a HOA Karen at these poor souls.
creator: Subconscious
